steps.title: Use vertex form
steps.content:
The maximum height is the vertex. Since the ball reaches $70.56$ meters at $2.1$ seconds, write the height model as
$$h=a(t-2.1)^2+70.56$$

steps.title: Complete the model
steps.content: Substitute $a=-16$ into vertex form. $$h=-16(t-2.1)^2+70.56$$ The answer is D.
